warnings: This sheet (A-12) shows two separate eave/fascia detail sections, R1 (grid B) and R2 (grid E), at different locations of the roof. Per project convention they are split into separate files: this file (R1) and the sibling บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01_หน้า14_eave_r2.json (R2).

There is a vertical dimension note near the eave-to-column connection reading approximately 'ระยะ...ตามแบบโครงสร้าง' with a value near '±1.30 ม.' — the exact wording and whether the number is 1.30 could not be confidently resolved from the image; needs_human_review_zoom_required.
This is a wood/fiber-cement/metal-roofing detail, not a reinforced-concrete element, so main_bar/stirrup are left null.
